datasets.name: kpi_orders_per_minute
datasets.query: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(timestamp), MAX(timestamp)), 1), 2) AS orders_per_minute FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS

datasets.name: kpi_total_orders
datasets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS

datasets.name: kpi_latest_event
datasets.query: SELECT MAX(timestamp) AS latest_event_time FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS

datasets.name: kpi_streaming_lag
datasets.query: SELECT ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(current_timestamp()) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(timestamp))) / 60, 2) AS lag_minutes FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS

datasets.name: kpi_low_stock_alerts
datasets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS low_stock_alerts FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS AND quantity_remaining < 10

datasets.name: orders_per_minute_trend
datasets.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) AS minute_bucket, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) ORDER BY minute_bucket

datasets.name: events_per_minute
datasets.query: SELECT minute_bucket, event_type, event_count FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) AS minute_bucket, 'Orders' AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) AS minute_bucket, 'Inventory' AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp)) ORDER BY minute_bucket, event_type

datasets.name: store_distribution
datasets.query: SELECT store_id, event_type, event_count FROM (SELECT store_id, 'Orders' AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY store_id UNION ALL SELECT store_id, 'Inventory' AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY store_id) ORDER BY store_id, event_type

datasets.name: low_stock_by_store
datasets.query: SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS low_stock_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS AND quantity_remaining < 10 GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY low_stock_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: low_stock_by_product
datasets.query: SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS low_stock_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS AND quantity_remaining < 10 GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY low_stock_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: stock_level_distribution
datasets.query: SELECT CASE WHEN quantity_remaining < 10 THEN 'Low' WHEN quantity_remaining < 50 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS stock_bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY CASE WHEN quantity_remaining < 10 THEN 'Low' WHEN quantity_remaining < 50 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END ORDER BY stock_bucket

datasets.name: latency_trend
datasets.displayName: Event Time vs Ingest Time Delay Trend
datasets.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) AS minute_bucket, ROUND(AVG(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(processing_timestamp) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(event_timestamp)), 2) AS avg_delay_seconds FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS AND processing_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND event_timestamp IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('minute', timestamp) ORDER BY minute_bucket

datasets.name: duplicate_orders
datasets.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN cnt > 1 THEN cnt - 1 ELSE 0 END) AS duplicate_count FROM (SELECT order_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

datasets.name: null_critical_fields
datasets.query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN order_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN product_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN store_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_count FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS

datasets.name: recent_orders
datasets.query: SELECT order_id, product_id, store_id, quantity, order_channel, timestamp FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_orders WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

datasets.name: recent_inventory
datasets.query: SELECT inventory_id, product_id, store_id, quantity_remaining, stock_status, timestamp FROM maven_market_uc.silver.silver_inventory WHERE timestamp >= current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
